---
name: Bug report
about: Report unexpected behavior or errors
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots if available.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11 |
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125 |
| Node.js | e.g. 22.x |
| Docker | e.g. 26.x |
| Connection type | SSH / RDP / N/A |

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (logs, config snippets, etc.).
